avalancheActivity.highlights: Significant decrease in danger of moist and wet avalanches as the temperature drops.
avalancheActivity.comment:
In all altitude zones hardly any more moist and wet avalanches are to be expected as the temperature drops.
Dry avalanches can be released, mostly by large loads. Especially steep shady slopes high altitudes and the high Alpine regions:

There is a danger of falling on the hard snow surface.

snowpackStructure.comment:
The weather conditions fostered a gradual strengthening of the snowpack. Towards its surface, the snowpack is largely stable and its surface has a melt-freeze crust that is strong in many cases.
Especially steep shady slopes high altitudes and the high Alpine regions: Weak layers exist in the snowpack.

In the vicinity of peaks snow depths vary greatly, depending on the infuence of the wind.
In places that are protected from the wind in all altitude zones a lot of snow is lying for the time of year.

avalancheActivity.highlights: Significant decrease in danger of moist and wet avalanches as the temperature drops.
avalancheActivity.comment:
The weather conditions fostered a substantial stabilisation of the snowpack.
As a consequence of falling temperatures, the natural avalanche activity will rapidly decrease.

In particular on shady slopes the avalanches can penetrate even deep layers and reach medium size in some cases. They can as before be released, in particular by large loads. Caution is to be exercised in particular on very steep slopes, and adjacent to ridgelines and in gullies and bowls.

There is a danger of falling on the hard snow surface.

snowpackStructure.comment:
In the vicinity of peaks snow depths vary greatly, depending on the infuence of the wind. In addition, only a small amount of snow is lying for the time of year.

Especially steep shady slopes high altitudes and the high Alpine regions: Weak layers exist in the old snowpack.
Towards its surface, the snowpack is largely stable and its surface has a melt-freeze crust that is strong in many cases.

avalancheActivity.highlights: Further decrease in danger of moist and wet avalanches as the temperature drops.
avalancheActivity.comment:
During the day: Hardly any moist and wet avalanches are possible, but they will be mostly small, in particular at low and intermediate altitudes.

There is a danger of falling on the hard snow surface. This applies in particular on steep slopes in high Alpine regions.

snowpackStructure.comment:
In particular in the vicinity of peaks snow depths vary greatly, depending on the infuence of the wind.

The surface of the snowpack has frozen to form a strong crust.
